title: Ticket 08 - Provider change, return and deletion confirmation
description: Dummy data for Ticket 08 - provider change, return and deletion confirmation (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.

questions.prompt: In Ticket 08 the expert statement appears: "Classify and apply provider change, return and deletion confirmation reliably in daily operations." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand provider change, return and deletion confirmation in daily work and implement it properly.
options.explanation: This summarizes the core idea directly and in a practical way.

options.text: We can ignore provider change, return and deletion confirmation as long as there is no time pressure.
options.explanation: The topic should not be postponed or waited out.

options.text: Only team management is allowed to deal with provider change, return and deletion confirmation.
options.explanation: That makes the topic unnecessarily exclusive and misses the learning goal.

options.text: Provider change, return and deletion confirmation only become relevant after the project ends.
options.explanation: The learning goal must be applied in daily operations.

questions.prompt: Which response best fits Ticket 08 for provider change, return and deletion confirmation?

options.text: Briefly align, document cleanly and make the next step clear.
options.explanation: This combines clarification, transparency and actionable execution.

options.text: Write nothing down at first and decide later by gut feeling.
options.explanation: That would be imprecise and risky here.

options.text: Only address problems once they have fully escalated.
options.explanation: The right direction is to clarify early rather than escalate late.

options.text: Avoid clarifying questions even when the goal is still unclear.
options.explanation: The learning goal demands clarity, not silent guessing.
